preferredDescription: SoftBridge Solutions is an independent AI-first software engineering and digital product company founded by Yunus Emre Gürlek in Adana, Türkiye. It develops AI applications, SaaS products, education technology platforms, web applications and custom software for Türkiye, Europe and international markets.
